candidate_llm_application: LLM positional-encoding rotation spectrum: rotate position-encoding spectrum at each waypoint of long-context inference; 32-point spectral allocation guides attention bearing.

results.title: Rotary Positional Encoding / Long-Context Attention: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on rotary positional encoding / long-context attention, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
